ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial year */,
  "year_start" TEXT /* Start date of the financial year */,
  "year_end" TEXT /* End date of the financial year */,
  "year_description" TEXT /* Description of the financial year */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the financial year is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial year */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets value in lakhs */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset */,
  "asset_description" TEXT /* Description of the asset */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date when the asset was acquired */,
  "depreciation" REAL /* Depreciation value of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES financial_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial year */,
  "total_income" REAL /* Total income value in lakhs */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the income */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES financial_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial year */,
  "total_expenses" REAL /* Total expenses value in lakhs */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the expense */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES financial_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profit" (
  "profit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profit record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial year */,
  "profit_after_tax" REAL /* Profit after tax value in lakhs */,
  "gross_profit" REAL /* Gross profit before tax */,
  "operating_profit" REAL /* Operating profit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profit_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES financial_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial year */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Annual, Quarterly) */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES financial_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., accountant, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial year */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., income, expense) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency of the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "reference_number" TEXT /* Reference number for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES financial_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currency ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currency" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code of the currency (e.g., INR, USD) */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate against the base currency */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency against which the exchange rate is defined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where change occurred */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the change made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
